image:image.image:title: MODCON Agartha — Forest Farm Estate, Narsapur Hyderabad
image:image.image:caption: 25-acre permaculture farm estate curated by The Green Team. AQI 12, 40 min from Hyderabad Financial District.

image:image.image:title: Forest house at dusk — The Green Team
image:image.image:caption: Forest-adjacent living curated by The Green Team, Hyderabad

image:image.image:title: MODCON Agartha — Forest Farm Plots, Narsapur
image:image.image:caption: 36 curated farm plots on the Narsapur forest boundary. From ₹68.7 L. AQI 12.

image:image.image:title: MODCON Agartha official render — The Green Team
image:image.image:caption: Winner: Best Sustainable Eco-Friendly Project, Outlook Business 2024.

image:image.image:title: MODCON Agartha site plan layout
image:image.image:caption: Master plan of MODCON Agartha — 36 farm plots, 36,000 sq ft clubhouse, Narsapur, Hyderabad.

image:image.image:title: MODCON SYL Residences — Villaments, Tukkuguda Hyderabad
image:image.image:caption: Forest-adjacent villaments at ORR Exit-14 Tukkuguda. 10 min to airport. Curated by The Green Team.

image:image.image:title: Dates County by Planet Green — Kandukur, Hyderabad
image:image.image:caption: Date farm plots at Kandukur. ₹18,000/sq yd. Curated by The Green Team.

image:image.image:title: Dates County natural forest surroundings
image:image.image:caption: Natural green surroundings at Dates County, Kandukur.
